ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Specific model of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the device */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last sync with the server */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity took place */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walking, running, cycling) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that tracked the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the activity in kilometers */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the activity took place */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the activity */,
  "heart_rate_avg" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "heart_rate_max" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate during the activity */,
  "is_manual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the activity was manually logged by the user */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the activity data (e.g., device, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity level */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity that this level belongs to */,
  "level_type" TEXT /* Type of activity level (e.g., sedentary, lightly active, fairly active, very active) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity level in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the activity level in kilometers */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity level */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity level */,
  "heart_rate_avg" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity level */,
  "heart_rate_max" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate during the activity level */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Elevation gain during the activity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_levels_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calorie_burn" (
  "calorie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calorie burn entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity that this calorie burn entry belongs to */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories burned during the activity */,
  "heart_rate_avg" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the calorie burn */,
  "heart_rate_max" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate during the calorie burn */,
  "metabolic_rate" REAL /* Metabolic rate during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calorie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calorie_burn_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity that this step entry belongs to */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the step count */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the step count */,
  "cadence" INTEGER /* Cadence (steps per minute) during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steps_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity that this distance entry belongs to */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the activity in kilometers */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the distance measurement */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the distance measurement */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace (minutes per kilometer) during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distance_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walking, running, cycling) */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the goal (e.g., number of steps, distance) */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date by which the goal should be achieved */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the goal has been completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the goal was completed */,
  "reminder_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reminders for the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal that this progress entry belongs to */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date when the progress was made */,
  "progress_value" INTEGER /* Value of the progress (e.g., number of steps, distance) */,
  "is_achieved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the progress entry represents an achievement */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES activity_goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., workout, nutrition) */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recommendation has been completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., goal achievement, new feature) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., unit system, notification preferences) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
